content:
# Friction Angle

**Summary**: The angle of internal friction between two surfaces in contact.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-tariq|Tariq, 2016]] modeled the prediction of FANG using various combinations of well log parameters.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-tariq|Tariq, 2016]] Friction angle is critical for determining the stability and geomechanical behavior of rock formations.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-tariq|Tariq, 2016]] determined from core samples and predicted via machine learning.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Case 3 (5 inputs) was identified as the best configuration for predicting FANG. ([[2016-tariq|Tariq, 2016, p. 142]])
